artPrompt: A great rusted pipe disgorging glowing murky-green effluent into a once-clear creek, the water blooming sickly bioluminescent and thick, drifting litter swirling in the current, mutant reeds sprouting along the banks under a bruised stormy sky, rust-red stains bleeding down the concrete spillway, no figures, a tender mournful ruin, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Runoff Into the Creek
text: Add {R}{R}{G}{G}. Spend this mana only this turn. Then put a sludge counter on each creature you control. (The pipe was supposed to go to a treatment facility. It goes to the creek.)
flavorText: The fine for this was forty dollars. The town paid it gladly.
